title: OCI Privilege Escalation Chain Detection
description: Identifies sequences where a user creates a policy, group, or dynamic group followed by role assignment — a common privilege escalation pattern.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('Event Type' like '*createpolicy*' or 'Event Type' like '*creategroup*' or 'Event Type' like '*createdynamicgroup*' or 'Event Type' like '*addusertogroup*') | stats count as actions, distinctcount('Event Type') as distinct_actions, earliest(Time) as first_action, latest(Time) as last_action by 'Principal Name' | where distinct_actions >= 2 | sort -distinct_actions
notes: Look for users performing multiple IAM changes in sequence. A single user creating a group AND a policy AND adding themselves is highly suspicious.
